title: Game Boys Lunch Bag, Graffiti Style Kids Lunch Box, Reusable and Waterproof Lunchbox for Boys, Insulated Lunchbag with Mesh Bag for School, Travel, Picnic
features: Personalized Design: This boys lunch box restores the classic game console elements in a street graffiti style. The bright colors and game console patterns collide with strong visual tension, accurately hitting boys' love for game culture.

High Quality Material: This lunch box kids is made of high-quality polyester fabric, which is not only lightweight and easy to carry, but also has excellent wear-resistant and waterproof properties. It is not afraid of friction and liquid splashes in daily use, and stains can be cleaned with a simple wipe

Product Size: This insulated lunch bag measures 9.8 x 7.5 x 3.1 in, offering ample interior space to easily accommodate a lunch box or fruit box without being too bulky to carry. The side mesh pockets offer storage for tissues, wipes, or a water bottle, allowing for easy access.

Widely Used: This packed lunch bag has a wide range of uses, whether it is to carry it to the classroom on the way to school, to pack lunch on the way, to store delicious food on a picnic, to carry energy supplies on a hike, or to store drinks and fruits on a beach outing.

Perfect Gift: This kids lunch bag is designed for boys who love gaming. Whether it's a thoughtful birthday gift, a practical back-to-school accessory, or a heartwarming holiday surprise, this lunch bag will make your child feel special and let them start every lunchtime with a love of gaming.
